description: Complete fix list for alerts skill audit — all SKILL.md and script fixes

cat1.description: Clarify 'intelligent' in overview — add: Intelligence = trend detection, cross-category grouping, suppression learning, and self-audit of checker coverage
Move trigger phrases from frontmatter description into When to Use as bullet points
Add note: Health = project/codebase health, not infrastructure/server health
Add What This Skill Does NOT Do — not infra monitoring, uptime, CI status

cat2.description: Add warm-up before Phase 1 — mode, expected runtime, what to expect
Add phase transition markers between all 7 phases
Add graceful skip for zero alerts — show dashboard, skip Phases 3-5, go to Phase 6
Add mid-workflow escape hatch — after every 10 alerts offer skip to summary, remaining default to Defer
Add compaction resilience — persist decisions to session JSONL after each decision, read on resume

cat3.description: Add alert object schema: {severity, category, message, details, trend, suggested_action}
Add done-when gates: Phase 3 done when every alert decided, Phase 5 done when all fixes executed, Phase 7 done when files written and closure presented
Add checker failure handling: no_data or error → surface as INFO alert in Checker Health category, Phase 6 MUST flag no_data as blind spots
Add completion artifact summary at Phase 7 end
Specify dashboard format: cross-reference Benchmarks section, sort categories by score ascending (worst first)
Define session JSONL record format: {timestamp, alert_id, category, severity, message, decision, reason}

cat4.description: Add recommendation per alert: ERROR→Fix Now, WARNING declining→Fix Now, WARNING stable→Defer, INFO→Acknowledge
Add delegation protocol: 'you decide' → apply all recommendations, record as delegated-accept, show summary
Cross-reference session JSONL format from Phase 3 to Output section
Add decision revision gate at Phase 4: Review all decisions, Revise any? before executing deferred
Add alert grouping: 3+ same category+severity → group, show first example, Apply same to all?

cat5.description: Expand Integration section: neighbors (audit-health, ecosystem-health, session-begin), input, output artifacts, downstream skill routing
Add routing guide: quick health→/alerts, meta-audit→/audit-health, ecosystem→/ecosystem-health, deep code→/audit-code
Document top script dependencies (npm scripts, data source files, hooks that feed data)
Add invocation tracking at Phase 7 (value depends on review pipeline reading it)
Add skill-routing in suggested actions: map alert actions to specific skills
Context-aware mode: --limited from session-begin, ask mode if standalone

cat6.description: Add script failure handling: non-zero exit without JSON → report error, suggest diagnostics, don't proceed to Phase 2
Add partial output recovery: JSON parse fails → show raw output first 20 lines, ask debug or skip
Add suppression ratio guard: >50% suppressed → WARNING in Phase 6
Add scope escalation guard: fix >5min or >3 files → pause, ask continue or create task
Add script timeout guidance: limited ~15-30s, full ~30-60s, kill after 120s
Add baseline staleness check: >7 days old → note in dashboard, offer reset

cat7.description: Add MUST/SHOULD/MAY to all instructions throughout SKILL.md
Add Critical Rules section front-loaded after frontmatter: 1. Run script first 2. Present every alert 3. Recommend per alert 4. Log every decision 5. Never present score without running checkers
Move scoring formula to Phase 2 with cross-reference: Start at 100, -30/error, -10/warning, grades A-F
Expand Phase 3 with context card format example showing severity badge, trend, benchmark, suggested action, options

cat8.description: Replace generic When NOT to Use with named alternatives: domain audits, /audit-health, /ecosystem-health, skills:validate
Add routing guide after When NOT to Use
Add duplicate-run detection: check session JSONL timestamp, show previous results, offer re-run
Add inline-fix vs skill-handoff guidance: <2min fix inline, >2min defer and suggest skill

cat9.description: Add CLAUDE.md reference for inline fixes: follow project conventions in Section 6
Add learning loop: feedback about checker quality → alerts-history.jsonl as feedback record, consumed by Phase 6
Preserve trend data: extract summary stats to .claude/state/alerts-history.jsonl before cleanup, never cleaned up
Surface cross-session trends in Phase 2 dashboard from alerts-history.jsonl: last 5 sessions sparkline
Persist suppression rationale: reason field MUST be in suppression record, shown during Phase 6 stale review

cat10.description: Add progress indicators in Phase 3: Alert N of M (X fixed, Y deferred, Z ignored)
Dashboard table format: Category | Score | Rating | Alerts | Trend, sort worst first
Closure summary format: Health before→after, fixed/deferred/ignored/suppressed counts, session log path
Visual formatting guidance per phase: Phase 2=table, Phase 3=card, Phase 4=summary block, Phase 7=closure block, --- between phases
REJECTED: No emoji per project convention

critical.description: Fix findProjectRoot() in run-alerts.js — .claude/package.json breaks root detection. Fix: require CLAUDE.md as root marker. Affects ALL 32 fs.readFileSync paths.

high.description: Add missing weights for 7 categories in computeHealthScore(): hook-warnings, roadmap, consolidation, roadmap-health, debt-resolution, session-activity, commit-activity

Add consistent no_data handling to all checkers that silently return: checkDebtMetrics(1036), checkLearningEffectiveness(1198), checkTestResults(1681), checkReviewQuality, checkConsolidation, checkVelocity, checkSessionActivity, checkCommitActivity
Add measuredPct to healthScore output so coverage is visible: { grade, score, measuredPct, breakdown }

medium.description: Add addContext call to checkReviewQuality with benchmarks/ratings/totals
Add action field to 3 info alerts missing it: checkDebtMetrics(1126), checkPatternHotspots(2713), checkLearningEffectiveness info
Add type-check npm script to package.json: tsc --noEmit

findings.root_cause: post-read-handler.js line 81-83 rejects absolute paths (blanks filePath), but Claude Code passes absolute paths via $ARGUMENTS. Line 125 then returns early on empty filePath, skipping all context tracking.
findings.fix: Accept absolute paths in post-read-handler.js — normalize to relative for storage but don't reject. Change lines 81-83 to convert absolute paths to project-relative instead of blanking.
findings.reader: run-alerts.js checkContextTracking (if it existed), session-end summary

findings.root_cause: NOT A BUG. File only created when Agent/Task tool is invoked. Hook matcher is ^(task|Task|TASK)$. This session had no agent invocations, so file correctly doesn't exist.
findings.fix: No fix needed — document that this file is session-scoped and only exists when agents are used.

findings.root_cause: Same as DS-2 — written by track-agent-invocation.js:201 only when Agent/Task tool fires. No agents invoked = no file.
findings.fix: No fix needed — document that this is append-only and only populated when agents run.

findings.root_cause: DEAD CODE. saveWarnedFiles() defined at scripts/check-pattern-compliance.js:140 but NEVER CALLED anywhere in the file. Function exists but nothing invokes it.
findings.fix: Add saveWarnedFiles() call at the end of the compliance check — after collecting warned files, actually persist them.

findings.root_cause: NO WRITER EXISTS. run-alerts.js:2238 reads this file, hook-analytics.js:215 reads it, but no script or hook anywhere writes to it. The pre-commit hook doesn't log failures to JSONL.
findings.fix: Add commit failure logging to the pre-commit hook pipeline (block-push-to-main.js or a new commit-tracker hook) that appends failed commit details to commit-failures.jsonl.

findings.root_cause: NEVER CALLED AUTOMATICALLY. scripts/log-session-activity.js exists and works, npm scripts session:log and session:summary exist, but nothing in hooks or session-begin/end actually calls them. The script is standalone CLI-only.
findings.fix: Add session:log calls to session-start hook (--event=session_start) and session-end skill (--event=session_end). Optionally add to post-write hook for file_write events.

findings.root_cause: WORKS CORRECTLY. Written by session-end skill. File exists with data.

data_source_investigation.summary: 3 no-fix-needed (expected behavior), 4 real bugs: DS-1 (absolute path rejection kills context tracking), DS-4 (dead code never persists warned files), DS-5 (no writer for commit-failures), DS-6 (session-activity logger never called automatically)

checks.name: Scripts
checks.description: All scripts the skill invokes — exist, run without error, paths resolve correctly

checks.name: Hooks
checks.description: All hooks that feed data to the skill — configured, actually write output, no path mismatches

checks.name: Data files
checks.description: Every data file read has a writer, every file written has a reader (USER-REQ-3)

checks.name: npm scripts
checks.description: All npm run commands referenced in SKILL.md or scripts — exist in package.json, underlying script reachable

checks.name: Docs
checks.description: All documentation referenced in SKILL.md or companions — file exists, section/anchor still present

checks.name: Function health
checks.description: Internal functions produce output or set no_data, handle missing input gracefully, no silent return paths

checks.name: State files
checks.description: State file schema matches read/write usage, path writable, no orphaned fields. Compaction resilience is project-wide requirement.

phase_3_only.name: Adjacent skill contracts
phase_3_only.description: Referenced skills exist, interfaces match assumptions, handoff protocol consistent on both sides — checked in Phase 3 crosscheck

skill_creator.description: Add operational dependencies guidance to Step 2 planning — hooks, data pipelines, npm scripts, writer/reader verification
Update Step 2: compaction resilience is MUST for ALL skills, not conditional on 'runs long'
Add 'What This Skill Does NOT Do' to content checklist for commonly-confused scope
Add to content checklist: if interactive, recommend with rationale at every decision point
Add to Step 2 or Step 5: verify writer/reader pairs for all data files

skill_audit.description: Add Phase 2.5 Operational Dependency Check between Category Audit and Crosscheck — checks A-G
Covered by SA-1 — data pipeline verification lives in new phase
Add to operational dependency phase: MUST investigate root causes, not just note missing files
Add OD-CHECK-H (adjacent skill contract verification) explicitly to Phase 3

crosscheck_fixes.adjacent_skills: 0 contract mismatches — audit-health, ecosystem-health, audit-code, session-begin all exist and interfaces match
ecosystem_impact: hooks — DS-5 add commit failure logging
